结论：还不能算“可以直接运行”。我检查了你上传的 Fig5_generate.R，里面至少有 1 处确定会报错的阻断问题，另外还有 2 处建议先修。


确定会报错的地方
在构造 selected_nodes 时，这段写法有问题：


selected_nodes <- tibble(node = unique(c(selected_edges$node_from, selected_edges$node_to))) %>%
  mutate(
    is_core_selected = node %in% selected_nodes_core,
    module = {
      m1 <- selected_edges %>% filter(node_from == node | node_to == node) %>% pull(module)
      ...
    }
  )


这里 mutate() 里的 node 是整列向量，但你又把它拿去给 filter() 和 selected_edges 逐行比较。
这在运行时很容易触发长度不匹配，属于 Figure 5A 的硬错误。


更稳的改法是把 module 改成按每个节点逐个计算，例如：


selected_nodes <- tibble(node = unique(c(selected_edges$node_from, selected_edges$node_to))) %>%
  mutate(
    is_core_selected = node %in% selected_nodes_core,
    module = purrr::map_chr(node, function(nd) {
      m1 <- selected_edges %>%
        filter(node_from == nd | node_to == nd) %>%
        pull(module)
      m1 <- m1[!is.na(m1) & m1 != ""]
      if (length(m1) == 0) NA_character_ else names(sort(table(m1), decreasing = TRUE))[1]
    }),
    node_class = if_else(is_core_selected, "Core-selected node", "Context node")
  )


建议先修的两处
第一，geom_node_point() 里你把 color 和 stroke 直接写成了向量：


geom_node_point(
  aes(fill = node_class, shape = is_core_selected),
  size = 3.2,
  color = ifelse(layout_tbl$is_core_selected, "#1A1A1A", "#7F7F7F"),
  stroke = ifelse(layout_tbl$is_core_selected, 1.0, 0.4)
)


这类“未映射但传入整列向量”的写法在 ggplot 里不够稳，可能警告，也可能行为不一致。最好把它们先写进 layout_tbl，再映射或拆成两层点。


第二，Fig5_file_manifest.tsv 的写入顺序有个小逻辑问题：
你先把 file_manifest 写出去，然后才 append_manifest("Fig5_file_manifest", ...)。这样最终生成的 manifest 文件不会包含它自己那一行。这不影响出图，但会影响审计完整性。

file_manifest <- tibble(

append_manifest <- function(file_role, file_path, obj = NULL, note = "") {
  n_rows <- if (is.null(obj)) NA_integer_ else nrow(obj)
  n_cols <- if (is.null(obj)) NA_integer_ else ncol(obj)

  file_manifest <<- bind_rows(
    file_manifest,
    tibble(
      file_role = file_role,
      file_path = normalizePath(file_path, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE),
      n_rows = n_rows,
      n_cols = n_cols,
      generated_time = as.character(Sys.time()),
      note = note
    )
  )
}

write_tsv_out <- function(df, filename, role, note = "") {

  readr::write_tsv(df, fp)
  append_manifest(role, fp, df, note)
  invisible(fp)
}

save_pdf_out <- function(plot_obj, filename, role, width = 7, height = 5, note = "") {
  fp <- file.path(output_dir, filename)

  if (isTRUE(capabilities("cairo"))) {
    ggplot2::ggsave(
      filename = fp,
      plot = plot_obj,
      width = width,
      height = height,
      units = "in",
      device = grDevices::cairo_pdf
    )
    append_manifest(role, fp, NULL, paste0(note, ifelse(note == "", "", " | "), "device=cairo_pdf"))
  } else {
    ggplot2::ggsave(
      filename = fp,
      plot = plot_obj,
      width = width,
      height = height,
      units = "in",
      device = "pdf"
    )
    append_manifest(role, fp, NULL, paste0(note, ifelse(note == "", "", " | "), "device=pdf_fallback"))
  }

  invisible(fp)
}

missingness_log <- tibble(
  panel = character(),
  sample_id = character(),
  field = character(),

)

add_missingness <- function(panel, df, sample_col = "sample_id", fields) {
  stopifnot(sample_col %in% names(df))
  for (fld in fields) {
    if (!fld %in% names(df)) next
    miss <- df %>% filter(is.na(.data[[fld]]))
    if (nrow(miss) > 0) {
      missingness_log <<- bind_rows(
        missingness_log,
        miss %>%
          transmute(
            panel = panel,
            sample_id = as.character(.data[[sample_col]]),
            field = fld,
            reason = "Excluded due to NA in required plotting/statistics field",
            generated_time = as.character(Sys.time())
          )
      )
    }
  }
}

require_cols <- function(df, cols, file_tag) {
  miss <- setdiff(cols, names(df))
  if (length(miss) > 0) {
    stop(sprintf("Missing required column(s) in %s: %s", file_tag, paste(miss, collapse = ", ")), call. = FALSE)
  }

check_unique_sample_id <- function(df, file_tag, out_prefix) {
  dup <- df %>%
    mutate(sample_id = as.character(sample_id)) %>%
    count(sample_id, name = "n") %>%
    filter(!is.na(sample_id), n > 1)

  if (nrow(dup) > 0) {
    dup_full <- df %>% semi_join(dup, by = "sample_id") %>% arrange(sample_id)
    write_tsv_out(dup, paste0(out_prefix, "_duplicate_sample_id_summary.tsv"),
                  paste0(out_prefix, "_duplicate_summary"),
                  "Duplicate sample_id summary")
    write_tsv_out(dup_full, paste0(out_prefix, "_duplicate_sample_id_records.tsv"),
                  paste0(out_prefix, "_duplicate_records"),
                  "Duplicate sample_id records")
    stop(sprintf("Duplicate sample_id detected in %s. See exported duplicate files.", file_tag), call. = FALSE)
  }
}

profile_one <- function(df, file_label) {
  list(
    col_tbl = tibble(
      file = file_label,
      column_name = names(df),
      column_type = vapply(df, function(x) class(x)[1], character(1))
    ),
    preview = utils::head(df, 10) %>%
      mutate(.row_id_preview = row_number(), .before = 1),
    shape = tibble(file = file_label, n_rows = nrow(df), n_cols = ncol(df)),
    miss = tibble(
      file = file_label,
      column_name = names(df),
      n_missing = vapply(df, function(x) sum(is.na(x)), integer(1)),
      pct_missing = vapply(df, function(x) mean(is.na(x)), numeric(1))
    )
  )
}

norm_name <- function(x) tolower(gsub("[^a-z0-9]", "", x))

find_first_match <- function(df, candidates, required = TRUE, desc = "") {
  nm <- names(df)
  nn <- norm_name(nm)
  cand_norm <- norm_name(candidates)
  idx <- match(cand_norm, nn)
  idx <- idx[!is.na(idx)]
  if (length(idx) == 0) {
    if (required) {
      stop(sprintf("Cannot identify %s in columns: %s", desc, paste(nm, collapse = ", ")), call. = FALSE)
    }
    return(NA_character_)
  }
  nm[idx[1]]
}

find_pair <- function(df, pair_list, pair_desc) {
  nm <- names(df)
  nn <- norm_name(nm)
  for (p in pair_list) {
    a <- match(norm_name(p[1]), nn)
    b <- match(norm_name(p[2]), nn)
    if (!is.na(a) && !is.na(b)) {
      return(c(nm[a], nm[b]))
    }
  }
  stop(sprintf("Cannot identify %s column pair in file with columns: %s", pair_desc, paste(nm, collapse = ", ")), call. = FALSE)
}

coerce_bool <- function(x) {
  if (is.logical(x)) return(x)
  x_chr <- tolower(as.character(x))
  dplyr::case_when(
    x_chr %in% c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y", "supported", "support") ~ TRUE,
    x_chr %in% c("false", "f", "0", "no", "n", "absent") ~ FALSE,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )
}

ensure_numeric <- function(x) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(x)))

safe_factor_final_type <- function(x_cn) {
  x_cn <- as.character(x_cn)
  if (!all(stats::na.omit(unique(x_cn)) %in% final_type_levels_cn)) {
    bad <- sort(unique(x_cn[!x_cn %in% final_type_levels_cn]))
    stop(sprintf("Unexpected final_type values: %s", paste(bad, collapse = ", ")), call. = FALSE)
  }
  factor(x_cn, levels = final_type_levels_cn)
}

complete_state_grid <- function(df, fill_list = list()) {
  tidyr::complete(
    df,
    final_type = factor(final_type_levels_cn, levels = final_type_levels_cn),
    final_type_en = factor(final_type_levels_en, levels = final_type_levels_en),
    !!!fill_list

    tibble(
      method = "not_testable",
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p_value = NA_real_,
      df = NA_real_,
      note = "Insufficient non-missing data to perform Chi-square/Fisher"
    )
  } else {
    suppressWarnings(chisq_try <- tryCatch(chisq.test(tab, correct = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL))
    if (!is.null(chisq_try) && all(chisq_try$expected >= 5)) {
      tibble(
        method = "Chi-square",
        statistic = unname(chisq_try$statistic),
        p_value = chisq_try$p.value,
        df = unname(chisq_try$parameter),
        note = "Chi-square assumptions satisfied"
      )
    } else {
      fisher_try <- tryCatch(fisher.test(tab), error = function(e) e)
      if (inherits(fisher_try, "error")) {
        tibble(
          method = "fisher_failed",
          statistic = NA_real_,
          p_value = NA_real_,
          df = NA_real_,
          note = paste("Fisher test failed:", fisher_try$message)
        )
      } else {
        tibble(
          method = "Fisher",
          statistic = NA_real_,
          p_value = fisher_try$p.value,
          df = NA_real_,
          note = "Switched to Fisher due to expected count rule"
        )
      }
    }
  }
}

run_nonparam_panel <- function(df_in, value_col, panel_prefix, panel_title, y_label, add_hline_070 = FALSE) {
  stopifnot(all(c("sample_id", "final_type", "final_type_en", value_col) %in% names(df_in)))

  plot_data <- df_in %>%
    transmute(
      sample_id,
      final_type,
      final_type_en,
      value = .data[[value_col]]
    )

  plot_data_named <- plot_data %>% rename(!!value_col := value)
  add_missingness(panel_prefix, plot_data_named, fields = value_col)
  write_tsv_out(plot_data_named, paste0(panel_prefix, "_plot_data.tsv"), paste0(panel_prefix, "_plot_data"))

  d_nonmiss <- plot_data %>%
    filter(!is.na(value)) %>%
    mutate(
      final_type = factor(as.character(final_type), levels = final_type_levels_cn),
      final_type_en = factor(as.character(final_type_en), levels = final_type_levels_en)
    )

  group_n <- tibble(
    final_type = factor(final_type_levels_cn, levels = final_type_levels_cn),
    final_type_en = factor(final_type_levels_en, levels = final_type_levels_en)
  ) %>%
    left_join(d_nonmiss %>% count(final_type, final_type_en, name = "n"),
              by = c("final_type", "final_type_en")) %>%
    mutate(n = replace_na(n, 0L))

  write_tsv_out(group_n, paste0(panel_prefix, "_group_n.tsv"), paste0(panel_prefix, "_group_n"))

  kw_tbl <- if (nrow(d_nonmiss) >= 3 && dplyr::n_distinct(d_nonmiss$final_type_en[!is.na(d_nonmiss$final_type_en)]) >= 2) {
    kw <- tryCatch(kruskal.test(value ~ final_type_en, data = d_nonmiss), error = function(e) e)
    if (inherits(kw, "error")) {
      tibble(method = "kruskal.test", statistic = NA_real_, df = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_, note = kw$message)
    } else {
      tibble(
        method = "kruskal.test",
        statistic = unname(kw$statistic),
        df = unname(kw$parameter),
        p_value = kw$p.value,
        note = "OK"
      )
    }
  } else {
    tibble(
      method = "kruskal.test",
      statistic = NA_real_,
      df = NA_real_,
      p_value = NA_real_,
      note = "Insufficient non-missing samples or groups"
    )
  }
  write_tsv_out(kw_tbl, paste0(panel_prefix, "_kw.tsv"), paste0(panel_prefix, "_kw"))

  dunn_tbl <- if (nrow(d_nonmiss) >= 3 && dplyr::n_distinct(d_nonmiss$final_type_en[!is.na(d_nonmiss$final_type_en)]) >= 2) {
    dunn <- tryCatch(FSA::dunnTest(value ~ final_type_en, data = d_nonmiss, method = "bh"), error = function(e) e)
    if (inherits(dunn, "error")) {
      tibble(
        comparison = NA_character_,
        z = NA_real_,
        p_unadjusted = NA_real_,
        p_adjusted_BH = NA_real_,
        note = dunn$message
      )
    } else {
      as_tibble(dunn$res) %>%
        transmute(
          comparison = Comparison,
          z = Z,
          p_unadjusted = P.unadj,
          p_adjusted_BH = P.adj,
          note = "OK"
        )
    }
  } else {
    tibble(
      comparison = NA_character_,
      z = NA_real_,
      p_unadjusted = NA_real_,
      p_adjusted_BH = NA_real_,
      note = "Insufficient non-missing samples or groups"
    )
  }
  write_tsv_out(dunn_tbl, paste0(panel_prefix, "_dunn.tsv"), paste0(panel_prefix, "_dunn"))

  effect_tbl <- if (nrow(d_nonmiss) >= 3 && dplyr::n_distinct(d_nonmiss$final_type_en[!is.na(d_nonmiss$final_type_en)]) >= 2) {
    eff <- tryCatch(rstatix::kruskal_effsize(d_nonmiss, value ~ final_type_en), error = function(e) e)
    if (inherits(eff, "error")) {
      tibble(
        method = "epsilon_squared",
        effect_size = NA_real_,
        magnitude = NA_character_,
        note = eff$message
      )
    } else {
      eff %>%
        transmute(
          method = "epsilon_squared",
          effect_size = effsize,
          magnitude = magnitude,
          note = "OK"
        )
    }
  } else {
    tibble(
      method = "epsilon_squared",
      effect_size = NA_real_,
      magnitude = NA_character_,
      note = "Insufficient non-missing samples or groups"
    )
  }
  write_tsv_out(effect_tbl, paste0(panel_prefix, "_effect_size.tsv"), paste0(panel_prefix, "_effect_size"))

  p <- ggplot(d_nonmiss, aes(x = final_type_en, y = value, fill = final_type_en)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.65, alpha = 0.85, color = "#4D4D4D") +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.16, size = 1.5, alpha = 0.70, color = "#333333") +
    scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = final_type_colors_en, guide = "none", drop = FALSE) +
    labs(
      title = panel_title,
      x = "Sample state",
      y = y_label
    ) +
    theme_fig

  if (isTRUE(add_hline_070)) {
    p <- p +
      geom_hline(
        aes(yintercept = 0.70, linetype = "Threshold (0.70)"),
        color = "#444444",
        linewidth = 0.6,
        show.legend = TRUE
      ) +
      scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Threshold (0.70)" = "dashed"), name = NULL)
  }

  save_pdf_out(p, paste0(panel_prefix, ".pdf"), paste0(panel_prefix, "_plot"), width = 6.5, height = 5)

  list(
    plot = p,
    plot_data = plot_data_named,
    group_n = group_n,
    kw = kw_tbl,
    dunn = dunn_tbl,
    effect = effect_tbl
  )
}

第三，5C 目前是最需要优先修的图。你的设计文件里把这一 panel 定义为 network_core_support_n，也就是“core network support 的数量”，本质上应当是非负计数或至少非负强度指标；但你当前 PDF 里 y 轴出现了大约 -0.4 到 0.4 的负值和小数，这与“数量”这个定义不相容。只要这一点不修，5C 的统计学显著性即使存在，也很难被解释成“support 数量差异”。更直接地说：现在 5C 不是一个语义自洽的 count panel。这很可能意味着你画到的是被中心化/标准化后的变量，或者 join 后用了错误列，或者原始 addon 表里这个字段本来就不是 count。


第四，5B 当前几乎不提供分组鉴别力。从你上传的比例图看，三组柱子都接近 100% 灰色，也就是 Absent 占主导，看不到明显的 Supported 分层。若图面真实反映数据，那就说明 network_core_support_any 在当前样本中几乎全为 FALSE，或者 TRUE 极少。这种结果并不是“错误”，但它意味着 5B 暂时不能承担“不同状态得到不同结构支持概率”这个强结论，最多只能说“在当前 addon 定义下，core support 是稀缺事件”。所以 5B 更像一个负结果或弱结果，而不是 Figure 5 的主力证据。


第五，5A 作为解释性 panel 是合格的，但作为证据 panel 偏弱。你现在的 5A 的确不是纯概念图，而是用了真实节点和边：页面上能看到 g__Angelica、g__Carthamus、g__Citrus、g__Paeonia、g__Prunus 五个节点，配有 reproducible/core-like 与 marker-specific 两类边。这个图很适合向审稿人解释“network addon 到底在看什么”。但它本质上还是一个高度选择的代表性子结构，更偏解释，不偏统计证据。所以它能支撑“network addon 有结构含义”，却不能单独支撑“某状态显著更受 network 支持”。


第六，5D-left 比 5B/5C 更接近可解释结果。从你上传的 burden 图看，至少在可视层面，Unresolved 组的散点离散度更大，范围也更宽，而另外两组更集中。这说明 marker-specific burden 可能更多地反映未定型样本的结构不稳定或异质性负担，而不是稳定多谱系型的核心特征。这个方向其实很有价值，但它支持的叙事会变成：
network addon 更擅长解释“为什么 unresolved 更杂、更难收束”，而不是证明 stable multi-lineage 一定获得更强 core support。


第七，5D-right 目前看起来方向上是对的，但证据还不够展开。你确实把 edge_stability_score 单独画出来了，而且 0.70 阈值线也明确标在图中，这符合最初设计。问题在于，我这边能直接看到的是图面结构和阈值存在，但还没成功直接展开你上传的 Fig5D_right_kw.tsv / dunn.tsv 的具体数值内容，所以我暂时不能负责任地替你下“显著高于/低于阈值”的统计结论。现阶段更安全的表述是：你已经把稳定性阈值显式可视化了，但这张图的论文结论强度仍然取决于统计表本身。


基于上面这些，我对 Figure 5 的科学解读是：


当前版本最稳的结论不是“稳定多谱系型显著获得更强 network 支持”，而是下面这句：


在样本状态已经由主判定建立之后，network addon 能进一步揭示一部分样本的结构性背景；其中，marker-specific burden 更像是在解释未定型样本的异质性，而不是单独定义稳定多谱系型。


换句话说，Figure 5 现在更适合扮演：


5A：解释 network addon 看什么；

5B：说明 core support 在当前定义下并不普遍；

5C：本应量化 core support 强度，但当前变量语义有问题，需先修；

5D-left：提示 unresolved 样本具有更高结构异质性；

5D-right：用阈值方式展示边稳定性，但结论强度要等统计表核实。


所以，Figure 5 目前最有希望写成亮点的是 5D-left，而不是 5B 或 5C。

file_manifest <- tibble(
  file_role = character(),
  file_path = character(),
  n_rows = integer(),
  n_cols = integer(),
  generated_time = character(),
  note = character()
)

append_manifest <- function(file_role, file_path, obj = NULL, note = "") {
  n_rows <- if (is.null(obj)) NA_integer_ else nrow(obj)
  n_cols <- if (is.null(obj)) NA_integer_ else ncol(obj)

  file_manifest <<- bind_rows(
    file_manifest,
    tibble(
      file_role = file_role,
      file_path = normalizePath(file_path, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE),
      n_rows = n_rows,
      n_cols = n_cols,
      generated_time = as.character(Sys.time()),
      note = note
    )
  )
}

write_tsv_out <- function(df, filename, role, note = "") {
  fp <- file.path(output_dir, filename)
  readr::write_tsv(df, fp)
  append_manifest(role, fp, df, note)
  invisible(fp)
}

save_pdf_out <- function(plot_obj, filename, role, width = 7, height = 5, note = "") {
  fp <- file.path(output_dir, filename)

  if (isTRUE(capabilities("cairo"))) {
    ggplot2::ggsave(
      filename = fp,
      plot = plot_obj,
      width = width,
      height = height,
      units = "in",
      device = grDevices::cairo_pdf
    )
    append_manifest(role, fp, NULL, paste0(note, ifelse(note == "", "", " | "), "device=cairo_pdf"))
  } else {
    ggplot2::ggsave(
      filename = fp,
      plot = plot_obj,
      width = width,
      height = height,
      units = "in",
      device = "pdf"
    )
    append_manifest(role, fp, NULL, paste0(note, ifelse(note == "", "", " | "), "device=pdf_fallback"))
  }

  invisible(fp)
}

missingness_log <- tibble(
  panel = character(),
  sample_id = character(),
  field = character(),
  reason = character(),
  generated_time = character()
)

add_missingness <- function(panel, df, sample_col = "sample_id", fields) {
  stopifnot(sample_col %in% names(df))
  for (fld in fields) {
    if (!fld %in% names(df)) next
    miss <- df %>% filter(is.na(.data[[fld]]))
    if (nrow(miss) > 0) {
      missingness_log <<- bind_rows(
        missingness_log,
        miss %>%
          transmute(
            panel = panel,
            sample_id = as.character(.data[[sample_col]]),
            field = fld,
            reason = "Excluded due to NA in required plotting/statistics field",
            generated_time = as.character(Sys.time())
          )
      )
    }
  }
}

require_cols <- function(df, cols, file_tag) {
  miss <- setdiff(cols, names(df))
  if (length(miss) > 0) {
    stop(sprintf("Missing required column(s) in %s: %s", file_tag, paste(miss, collapse = ", ")), call. = FALSE)

check_unique_sample_id <- function(df, file_tag, out_prefix) {
  dup <- df %>%
    mutate(sample_id = as.character(sample_id)) %>%
    count(sample_id, name = "n") %>%
    filter(!is.na(sample_id), n > 1)

  if (nrow(dup) > 0) {
    dup_full <- df %>% semi_join(dup, by = "sample_id") %>% arrange(sample_id)
    write_tsv_out(dup, paste0(out_prefix, "_duplicate_sample_id_summary.tsv"),
                  paste0(out_prefix, "_duplicate_summary"),
                  "Duplicate sample_id summary")
    write_tsv_out(dup_full, paste0(out_prefix, "_duplicate_sample_id_records.tsv"),
                  paste0(out_prefix, "_duplicate_records"),
                  "Duplicate sample_id records")
    stop(sprintf("Duplicate sample_id detected in %s. See exported duplicate files.", file_tag), call. = FALSE)
  }
}

profile_one <- function(df, file_label) {
  list(
    col_tbl = tibble(
      file = file_label,
      column_name = names(df),
      column_type = vapply(df, function(x) class(x)[1], character(1))
    ),
    preview = utils::head(df, 10) %>%
      mutate(.row_id_preview = row_number(), .before = 1),
    shape = tibble(file = file_label, n_rows = nrow(df), n_cols = ncol(df)),
    miss = tibble(
      file = file_label,
      column_name = names(df),
      n_missing = vapply(df, function(x) sum(is.na(x)), integer(1)),
      pct_missing = vapply(df, function(x) mean(is.na(x)), numeric(1))
    )
  )
}

norm_name <- function(x) tolower(gsub("[^a-z0-9]", "", x))

find_first_match <- function(df, candidates, required = TRUE, desc = "") {
  nm <- names(df)
  nn <- norm_name(nm)
  cand_norm <- norm_name(candidates)
  idx <- match(cand_norm, nn)
  idx <- idx[!is.na(idx)]
  if (length(idx) == 0) {
    if (required) stop(sprintf("Cannot identify %s in columns: %s", desc, paste(nm, collapse = ", ")), call. = FALSE)
    return(NA_character_)
  }
  nm[idx[1]]
}

find_pair <- function(df, pair_list, pair_desc) {
  nm <- names(df)
  nn <- norm_name(nm)
  for (p in pair_list) {
    a <- match(norm_name(p[1]), nn)
    b <- match(norm_name(p[2]), nn)
    if (!is.na(a) && !is.na(b)) {
      return(c(nm[a], nm[b]))
    }
  }
  stop(sprintf("Cannot identify %s column pair in file with columns: %s", pair_desc, paste(nm, collapse = ", ")), call. = FALSE)
}

coerce_bool <- function(x) {
  if (is.logical(x)) return(x)
  x_chr <- tolower(as.character(x))
  dplyr::case_when(
    x_chr %in% c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y", "supported", "support") ~ TRUE,
    x_chr %in% c("false", "f", "0", "no", "n", "absent") ~ FALSE,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )
}

ensure_numeric <- function(x) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(x)))

# metric semantic checks
validate_network_metrics <- function(df) {
  qc_issues <- list()

  # network_core_support_n should be non-negative and integer-like
  bad_core_n <- df %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(network_core_support_n) &
        (network_core_support_n < 0 | abs(network_core_support_n - round(network_core_support_n)) > 1e-8)
    )
  if (nrow(bad_core_n) > 0) {
    qc_issues$core_support_n <- bad_core_n %>%
      select(sample_id, final_type, final_type_en, network_core_support_n)
  }

  # burden should be non-negative
  bad_burden <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(network_marker_specific_burden) & network_marker_specific_burden < 0)
  if (nrow(bad_burden) > 0) {
    qc_issues$marker_specific_burden <- bad_burden %>%
      select(sample_id, final_type, final_type_en, network_marker_specific_burden)
  }

  # stability should be within [0, 1]
  bad_stability <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(edge_stability_score) & (edge_stability_score < 0 | edge_stability_score > 1))
  if (nrow(bad_stability) > 0) {
    qc_issues$edge_stability_score <- bad_stability %>%
      select(sample_id, final_type, final_type_en, edge_stability_score)
  }

  if (length(qc_issues) > 0) {
    for (nm in names(qc_issues)) {
      write_tsv_out(
        qc_issues[[nm]],
        paste0("Fig5_QC_invalid_", nm, ".tsv"),
        paste0("Fig5_QC_invalid_", nm),
        "Semantic validation failure"
      )
    }
    stop(
      paste0(
        "Semantic validation failed for one or more Figure 5 metrics. ",
        "See Fig5_QC_invalid_*.tsv in output_dir. ",
        "Most importantly, network_core_support_n must be a non-negative count."
      ),
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }

  # soft warning if binary support is constant
  core_any_nonmiss <- df %>% filter(!is.na(network_core_support_any))
  if (nrow(core_any_nonmiss) > 0 && dplyr::n_distinct(core_any_nonmiss$network_core_support_any) == 1) {
    warn_tbl <- core_any_nonmiss %>%
      count(network_core_support_any, name = "n") %>%
      mutate(note = "Binary core support is constant across all non-missing samples; Fig5B will be weak or untestable.")
    write_tsv_out(warn_tbl, "Fig5_QC_warning_core_support_any_constant.tsv",
                  "Fig5_QC_warning_core_support_any_constant",
                  "Soft warning")
  }

  invisible(TRUE)
}

})

require_cols(df_sample, c("sample_id", "final_type"), "sample_type_call.tsv")
require_cols(df_addon, c("sample_id"), "sample_type_call_network_addon.tsv")

  )

validate_network_metrics(plot_base)

# ------------------------------
# 5) Figure 5A - Network schematic
# ------------------------------
edge_pairs <- list(
  c("source", "target"),
  c("from", "to"),
  c("node1", "node2"),
  c("taxon_a", "taxon_b")
)

rep_pair <- find_pair(df_rep, edge_pairs, "reproducible_edges endpoints")
ms_pair  <- find_pair(df_mspec, edge_pairs, "marker_specific_edges endpoints")

rep_stability_col <- find_first_match(
  df_rep,
  c("edge_stability_score", "stability_score", "edge_stability", "stability"),
  required = FALSE,
  desc = "edge stability score in reproducible_edges"
)
rep_strict_col <- find_first_match(
  df_rep,
  c("reproducible_edge_strict", "edge_strict", "strict", "is_strict"),
  required = FALSE,
  desc = "strict reproducible edge flag"
)
rep_loose_col <- find_first_match(
  df_rep,
  c("reproducible_edge_loose", "edge_loose", "loose", "is_loose"),
  required = FALSE,
  desc = "loose reproducible edge flag"
)
rep_module_col <- find_first_match(
  df_rep,
  c("core_module", "module", "component", "cluster"),
  required = FALSE,
  desc = "module/core module in reproducible_edges"
)

ms_marker_col <- find_first_match(
  df_mspec,
  c("marker_specific_edge_flag", "marker_specific", "is_marker_specific", "marker_flag"),
  required = FALSE,
  desc = "marker-specific edge flag"
)
ms_module_col <- find_first_match(
  df_mspec,
  c("core_module", "module", "component", "cluster"),
  required = FALSE,
  desc = "module/core module in marker_specific_edges"
)

rep_edges_std <- df_rep %>%
  transmute(
    node_from = as.character(.data[[rep_pair[1]]]),
    node_to   = as.character(.data[[rep_pair[2]]]),
    edge_type = "reproducible/core-like",
    edge_stability_score = if (!is.na(rep_stability_col)) ensure_numeric(.data[[rep_stability_col]]) else NA_real_,
    reproducible_edge_strict = if (!is.na(rep_strict_col)) coerce_bool(.data[[rep_strict_col]]) else NA,
    reproducible_edge_loose  = if (!is.na(rep_loose_col)) coerce_bool(.data[[rep_loose_col]]) else NA,
    marker_specific_edge_flag = FALSE,
    module = if (!is.na(rep_module_col)) as.character(.data[[rep_module_col]]) else NA_character_,
    source_table = "reproducible_edges.tsv"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(node_from), !is.na(node_to), node_from != "", node_to != "")

ms_edges_std <- df_mspec %>%
  transmute(
    node_from = as.character(.data[[ms_pair[1]]]),
    node_to   = as.character(.data[[ms_pair[2]]]),
    edge_type = "marker-specific",
    edge_stability_score = NA_real_,
    reproducible_edge_strict = NA,
    reproducible_edge_loose  = NA,
    marker_specific_edge_flag = if (!is.na(ms_marker_col)) coerce_bool(.data[[ms_marker_col]]) else TRUE,
    module = if (!is.na(ms_module_col)) as.character(.data[[ms_module_col]]) else NA_character_,
    source_table = "marker_specific_edges.tsv"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(node_from), !is.na(node_to), node_from != "", node_to != "")

all_edges <- bind_rows(rep_edges_std, ms_edges_std) %>%
  mutate(edge_id = row_number())

if (nrow(all_edges) == 0) {
  stop("No valid edges available after standardization for Figure 5A.", call. = FALSE)
}

rep_priority <- rep_edges_std %>%
  mutate(
    strict_priority = case_when(
      !is.na(reproducible_edge_strict) & reproducible_edge_strict ~ 2L,
      is.na(reproducible_edge_strict) & !is.na(edge_stability_score) & edge_stability_score >= 0.70 ~ 1L,
      !is.na(edge_stability_score) ~ 0L,
      TRUE ~ -1L
    ),
    stability_rank = if_else(is.na(edge_stability_score), -Inf, edge_stability_score)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(strict_priority), desc(stability_rank))

if (nrow(rep_priority) == 0) {
  stop("reproducible_edges.tsv has no usable edges for Figure 5A.", call. = FALSE)
}

cap_n <- min(80L, nrow(rep_priority))
rep_top <- rep_priority %>% slice_head(n = cap_n)

igraph_rep <- igraph::graph_from_data_frame(rep_top %>% select(node_from, node_to), directed = FALSE)
comp <- igraph::components(igraph_rep)

comp_tbl <- tibble(
  node = names(comp$membership),
  component = as.integer(comp$membership)
)

largest_comp <- comp_tbl %>%
  count(component, name = "n_nodes") %>%
  arrange(desc(n_nodes), component) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  pull(component)

selected_nodes_core <- comp_tbl %>%
  filter(component == largest_comp) %>%
  pull(node)

selected_rep_edges <- rep_top %>%
  filter(node_from %in% selected_nodes_core, node_to %in% selected_nodes_core)

if (length(selected_nodes_core) > 25) {
  selected_rep_edges <- selected_rep_edges %>%
    arrange(desc(strict_priority), desc(stability_rank)) %>%
    slice_head(n = min(40L, n()))
  selected_nodes_core <- unique(c(selected_rep_edges$node_from, selected_rep_edges$node_to))
}

selected_marker_edges <- ms_edges_std %>%
  filter(node_from %in% selected_nodes_core | node_to %in% selected_nodes_core)

if (nrow(selected_marker_edges) > 60) {
  selected_marker_edges <- selected_marker_edges %>% slice_head(n = 60)
}

selected_edges <- bind_rows(
  selected_rep_edges %>% mutate(selected_reason = "Prioritized reproducible/core-like edges"),
  selected_marker_edges %>% mutate(selected_reason = "Marker-specific edges touching selected core nodes")
) %>%
  mutate(
    module = na_if(module, ""),
    edge_type = factor(edge_type, levels = c("reproducible/core-like", "marker-specific"))
  ) %>%
  distinct(node_from, node_to, edge_type, .keep_all = TRUE)

if (nrow(selected_edges) == 0) {
  stop("Figure 5A selection produced zero edges; cannot plot schematic.", call. = FALSE)
}

selected_nodes <- tibble(node = unique(c(selected_edges$node_from, selected_edges$node_to))) %>%
  mutate(
    is_core_selected = node %in% selected_nodes_core,
    module = purrr::map_chr(node, function(nd) {
      m1 <- selected_edges %>%
        filter(node_from == nd | node_to == nd) %>%
        pull(module)
      m1 <- m1[!is.na(m1) & m1 != ""]
      if (length(m1) == 0) NA_character_ else names(sort(table(m1), decreasing = TRUE))[1]
    }),
    node_class = if_else(is_core_selected, "Core-selected node", "Context node")
  )

selection_log <- tibble(
  item = c(
    "reproducible_edge_endpoints",
    "marker_specific_edge_endpoints",
    "reproducible_stability_col",
    "reproducible_strict_col",
    "reproducible_loose_col",
    "reproducible_module_col",
    "marker_flag_col",
    "marker_module_col",
    "selection_rule_1",
    "selection_rule_2",
    "selection_rule_3",
    "selection_counts"
  ),
  value = c(
    paste(rep_pair, collapse = "|"),
    paste(ms_pair, collapse = "|"),
    ifelse(is.na(rep_stability_col), "<none>", rep_stability_col),
    ifelse(is.na(rep_strict_col), "<none>", rep_strict_col),
    ifelse(is.na(rep_loose_col), "<none>", rep_loose_col),
    ifelse(is.na(rep_module_col), "<none>", rep_module_col),
    ifelse(is.na(ms_marker_col), "<none>", ms_marker_col),
    ifelse(is.na(ms_module_col), "<none>", ms_module_col),
    "Prioritize strict reproducible edges; fallback to high-stability reproducible edges",
    "Select largest connected component among prioritized reproducible edges",
    "Add marker-specific edges connected to selected core nodes",
    paste0(
      "selected_edges=", nrow(selected_edges),
      "; selected_nodes=", nrow(selected_nodes),
      "; selected_core_nodes=", sum(selected_nodes$is_core_selected)
    )
  )
)

write_tsv_out(selected_edges, "Fig5A_selected_edges.tsv", "Fig5A_selected_edges")
write_tsv_out(selected_nodes, "Fig5A_selected_nodes.tsv", "Fig5A_selected_nodes")
write_tsv_out(selection_log, "Fig5A_selection_log.tsv", "Fig5A_selection_log")

gA_graph <- igraph::graph_from_data_frame(
  d = selected_edges %>% select(node_from, node_to, edge_type, module),
  directed = FALSE,
  vertices = selected_nodes %>% rename(name = node)
)

set.seed(123)
layout_tbl <- ggraph::create_layout(gA_graph, layout = "fr")
layout_df <- as_tibble(layout_tbl)

p5A <- ggraph(layout_tbl) +
  geom_edge_link(aes(color = edge_type), width = 0.9, alpha = 0.85, show.legend = TRUE) +
  geom_point(
    data = layout_df %>% filter(!is_core_selected),

    shape = 21, size = 3.2, stroke = 0.4, color = "#7F7F7F"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = layout_df %>% filter(is_core_selected),
    aes(x = x, y = y, fill = node_class),

  ) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    data = layout_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = name),
    size = 2.8,
    family = base_family,
    min.segment.length = 0,
    seed = 123,
    max.overlaps = 100
  ) +
  scale_edge_color_manual(values = edge_colors, name = "Edge class") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Core-selected node" = "#C8C8C8",
      "Context node" = "#E9E9E9"
    ),
    name = "Node class"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Network schematic from reproducible and marker-specific edges",
    subtitle = "Addon evidence only; does not rewrite final sample type",
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_void(base_family = base_family) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),

    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

save_pdf_out(p5A, "Fig5A_network_schematic.pdf", "Fig5A_plot", width = 8.5, height = 6)

fig5B_data <- plot_base %>%

add_missingness("Fig5B", fig5B_data, fields = c("network_core_support_any"))

fig5B_summary <- fig5B_data %>%

    )

  tidyr::complete(

  ) %>%

write_tsv_out(fig5B_group_n, "Fig5B_group_n.tsv", "Fig5B_group_n")

fig5B_stats <- {
  d <- fig5B_data %>% filter(!is.na(network_core_support_any))
  tab <- table(d$final_type_en, d$network_core_support_any)

  if (nrow(tab) < 2 || ncol(tab) < 2 || sum(tab) == 0) {
    tibble(
      method = "not_testable",
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p_value = NA_real_,
      df = NA_real_,
      note = "Insufficient non-missing data to perform Chi-square/Fisher"
    )
  } else {
    suppressWarnings(chisq_try <- tryCatch(chisq.test(tab, correct = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL))
    if (!is.null(chisq_try) && all(chisq_try$expected >= 5)) {
      tibble(
        method = "Chi-square",
        statistic = unname(chisq_try$statistic),
        p_value = chisq_try$p.value,
        df = unname(chisq_try$parameter),
        note = "Chi-square assumptions satisfied"
      )
    } else {
      fisher_try <- tryCatch(fisher.test(tab), error = function(e) e)
      if (inherits(fisher_try, "error")) {
        tibble(
          method = "fisher_failed",
          statistic = NA_real_,
          p_value = NA_real_,
          df = NA_real_,
          note = paste("Fisher test failed:", fisher_try$message)
        )
      } else {
        tibble(
          method = "Fisher",
          statistic = NA_real_,
          p_value = fisher_try$p.value,
          df = NA_real_,
          note = "Switched to Fisher due to expected count rule"
        )
      }
    }
  }
}
write_tsv_out(fig5B_stats, "Fig5B_stats.tsv", "Fig5B_stats")

# ------------------------------
# 7) Generic non-parametric helper
# ------------------------------
run_nonparam_panel <- function(df_in, value_col, panel_prefix, panel_title, y_label, add_hline_070 = FALSE) {
  stopifnot(all(c("sample_id", "final_type", "final_type_en", value_col) %in% names(df_in)))

  plot_data <- df_in %>%
    transmute(
      sample_id,
      final_type,
      final_type_en,
      value = .data[[value_col]]
    )

  plot_data_named <- plot_data %>% rename(!!value_col := value)
  add_missingness(panel_prefix, plot_data_named, fields = value_col)
  write_tsv_out(plot_data_named, paste0(panel_prefix, "_plot_data.tsv"), paste0(panel_prefix, "_plot_data"))

  d_nonmiss <- plot_data %>%
    filter(!is.na(value)) %>%
    mutate(
      final_type = factor(as.character(final_type), levels = final_type_levels_cn),
      final_type_en = factor(as.character(final_type_en), levels = final_type_levels_en)
    )

  group_n <- tibble(
    final_type = factor(final_type_levels_cn, levels = final_type_levels_cn),
    final_type_en = factor(final_type_levels_en, levels = final_type_levels_en)
  ) %>%
    left_join(d_nonmiss %>% count(final_type, final_type_en, name = "n"),
              by = c("final_type", "final_type_en")) %>%
    mutate(n = replace_na(n, 0L))

  write_tsv_out(group_n, paste0(panel_prefix, "_group_n.tsv"), paste0(panel_prefix, "_group_n"))

  kw_tbl <- if (nrow(d_nonmiss) >= 3 && dplyr::n_distinct(d_nonmiss$final_type_en[!is.na(d_nonmiss$final_type_en)]) >= 2) {
    kw <- tryCatch(kruskal.test(value ~ final_type_en, data = d_nonmiss), error = function(e) e)
    if (inherits(kw, "error")) {
      tibble(method = "kruskal.test", statistic = NA_real_, df = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_, note = kw$message)
    } else {
      tibble(
        method = "kruskal.test",
        statistic = unname(kw$statistic),
        df = unname(kw$parameter),
        p_value = kw$p.value,
        note = "OK"
      )
    }
  } else {
    tibble(
      method = "kruskal.test",
      statistic = NA_real_,
      df = NA_real_,
      p_value = NA_real_,
      note = "Insufficient non-missing samples or groups"
    )
  }
  write_tsv_out(kw_tbl, paste0(panel_prefix, "_kw.tsv"), paste0(panel_prefix, "_kw"))

  dunn_tbl <- if (nrow(d_nonmiss) >= 3 && dplyr::n_distinct(d_nonmiss$final_type_en[!is.na(d_nonmiss$final_type_en)]) >= 2) {
    dunn <- tryCatch(FSA::dunnTest(value ~ final_type_en, data = d_nonmiss, method = "bh"), error = function(e) e)
    if (inherits(dunn, "error")) {
      tibble(
        comparison = NA_character_,
        z = NA_real_,
        p_unadjusted = NA_real_,
        p_adjusted_BH = NA_real_,
        note = dunn$message
      )
    } else {
      as_tibble(dunn$res) %>%
        transmute(
          comparison = Comparison,
          z = Z,
          p_unadjusted = P.unadj,
          p_adjusted_BH = P.adj,
          note = "OK"
        )
    }
  } else {
    tibble(
      comparison = NA_character_,
      z = NA_real_,
      p_unadjusted = NA_real_,
      p_adjusted_BH = NA_real_,
      note = "Insufficient non-missing samples or groups"
    )
  }
  write_tsv_out(dunn_tbl, paste0(panel_prefix, "_dunn.tsv"), paste0(panel_prefix, "_dunn"))

  effect_tbl <- if (nrow(d_nonmiss) >= 3 && dplyr::n_distinct(d_nonmiss$final_type_en[!is.na(d_nonmiss$final_type_en)]) >= 2) {
    eff <- tryCatch(rstatix::kruskal_effsize(d_nonmiss, value ~ final_type_en), error = function(e) e)
    if (inherits(eff, "error")) {
      tibble(
        method = "epsilon_squared",
        effect_size = NA_real_,
        magnitude = NA_character_,
        note = eff$message
      )
    } else {
      eff %>%
        transmute(
          method = "epsilon_squared",
          effect_size = effsize,
          magnitude = magnitude,
          note = "OK"
        )
    }
  } else {
    tibble(
      method = "epsilon_squared",
      effect_size = NA_real_,
      magnitude = NA_character_,
      note = "Insufficient non-missing samples or groups"
    )
  }
  write_tsv_out(effect_tbl, paste0(panel_prefix, "_effect_size.tsv"), paste0(panel_prefix, "_effect_size"))

  p <- ggplot(d_nonmiss, aes(x = final_type_en, y = value, fill = final_type_en)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.65, alpha = 0.85, color = "#4D4D4D") +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.16, size = 1.5, alpha = 0.70, color = "#333333") +
    scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = final_type_colors_en, guide = "none", drop = FALSE) +
    labs(
      title = panel_title,
      x = "Sample state",
      y = y_label
    ) +
    theme_fig

  if (isTRUE(add_hline_070)) {
    p <- p +
      geom_hline(
        aes(yintercept = 0.70, linetype = "Threshold (0.70)"),
        color = "#444444",
        linewidth = 0.6,
        show.legend = TRUE
      ) +
      scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Threshold (0.70)" = "dashed"), name = NULL)
  }

  save_pdf_out(p, paste0(panel_prefix, ".pdf"), paste0(panel_prefix, "_plot"), width = 6.5, height = 5)

  list(
    plot = p,
    plot_data = plot_data_named,
    group_n = group_n,
    kw = kw_tbl,
    dunn = dunn_tbl,
    effect = effect_tbl
  )
}

fig5C_input <- plot_base %>%

append_manifest <- function(file_role, file_path, obj = NULL, note = "") {
  n_rows <- if (is.null(obj)) NA_integer_ else nrow(obj)
  n_cols <- if (is.null(obj)) NA_integer_ else ncol(obj)

  file_manifest <<- bind_rows(
    file_manifest,

      file_role = file_role,
      file_path = normalizePath(file_path, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE),
      n_rows = n_rows,
      n_cols = n_cols,
      generated_time = as.character(Sys.time()),
      note = note

  )

      level = level,
      message = message,
      n_records = n_records,

    )
  )
}

write_tsv_out <- function(df, filename, role, note = "") {

  invisible(fp)
}

save_pdf_out <- function(plot_obj, filename, role, width = 7, height = 5, note = "") {
  fp <- file.path(output_dir, filename)

  if (isTRUE(capabilities("cairo"))) {
    ggplot2::ggsave(
      filename = fp,
      plot = plot_obj,
      width = width,
      height = height,
      units = "in",
      device = grDevices::cairo_pdf
    )
    append_manifest(role, fp, NULL, paste0(note, ifelse(note == "", "", " | "), "device=cairo_pdf"))
  } else {
    ggplot2::ggsave(
      filename = fp,
      plot = plot_obj,
      width = width,
      height = height,
      units = "in",
      device = "pdf"
    )
    append_manifest(role, fp, NULL, paste0(note, ifelse(note == "", "", " | "), "device=pdf_fallback"))
  }

  invisible(fp)
}

read_tsv_safe <- function(path) {

require_cols <- function(df, cols, file_tag) {
  miss <- setdiff(cols, names(df))
  if (length(miss) > 0) {
    stop(sprintf("Missing required column(s) in %s: %s", file_tag, paste(miss, collapse = ", ")), call. = FALSE)
  }
}

check_unique_sample_id <- function(df, file_tag) {
  dup <- df %>%
    mutate(sample_id = as.character(sample_id)) %>%
    count(sample_id, name = "n") %>%
    filter(!is.na(sample_id), n > 1)
  if (nrow(dup) > 0) {
    write_tsv_out(dup, paste0("QC_duplicate_sample_id_", basename(file_tag), ".tsv"),
                  paste0("QC_duplicate_", basename(file_tag)),
                  "Duplicate sample_id summary")
    stop(sprintf("Duplicate sample_id detected in %s.", file_tag), call. = FALSE)
  }
}

norm_name <- function(x) tolower(gsub("[^a-z0-9]", "", x))

coerce_bool <- function(x) {
  if (is.logical(x)) return(x)
  x_chr <- tolower(as.character(x))
  dplyr::case_when(
    x_chr %in% c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y", "supported", "support") ~ TRUE,
    x_chr %in% c("false", "f", "0", "no", "n", "absent") ~ FALSE,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )
}

ensure_numeric <- function(x) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(x)))

is_integerish_nonneg <- function(x) {
  y <- x[!is.na(x)]
  length(y) > 0 && all(y >= 0) && all(abs(y - round(y)) < 1e-8)
}

is_nonneg_numeric <- function(x) {
  y <- x[!is.na(x)]
  length(y) > 0 && all(y >= 0)
}

is_unit_interval_numeric <- function(x) {
  y <- x[!is.na(x)]
  length(y) > 0 && all(y >= 0 & y <= 1)
}

get_existing_candidates <- function(df, candidates) {
  nm <- names(df)
  nn <- norm_name(nm)
  out <- character(0)
  for (cand in candidates) {
    idx <- match(norm_name(cand), nn)
    if (!is.na(idx)) out <- c(out, nm[idx])
  }
  unique(out)
}

resolve_metric_col <- function(df, candidates, validator, metric_label, panel = "global") {
  existing <- get_existing_candidates(df, candidates)

  if (length(existing) == 0) {
    stop(sprintf("Cannot locate any candidate column for %s.", metric_label), call. = FALSE)
  }

  for (cand in existing) {
    vec <- ensure_numeric(df[[cand]])
    if (validator(vec)) {
      add_qc_log("column_resolution", panel, metric_label, "info",
                 sprintf("Resolved %s to column: %s", metric_label, cand),
                 sum(!is.na(vec)))
      return(cand)
    }
  }

  # if none passed validator, still report candidates
  add_qc_log("column_resolution", panel, metric_label, "error",
             sprintf("Candidate columns found but none passed semantic validation: %s",
                     paste(existing, collapse = ", ")),
             NA_integer_)
  stop(sprintf("No semantically valid column found for %s.", metric_label), call. = FALSE)
}

resolve_bool_col <- function(df, candidates, metric_label, panel = "global") {
  existing <- get_existing_candidates(df, candidates)
  if (length(existing) == 0) {
    stop(sprintf("Cannot locate any candidate column for %s.", metric_label), call. = FALSE)
  }

  for (cand in existing) {
    vec <- coerce_bool(df[[cand]])
    y <- vec[!is.na(vec)]
    if (length(y) > 0) {
      add_qc_log("column_resolution", panel, metric_label, "info",
                 sprintf("Resolved %s to column: %s", metric_label, cand),
                 length(y))
      return(cand)
    }
  }

  add_qc_log("column_resolution", panel, metric_label, "error",
             sprintf("Candidate columns found but none had usable boolean values: %s",
                     paste(existing, collapse = ", ")),
             NA_integer_)
  stop(sprintf("No usable boolean column found for %s.", metric_label), call. = FALSE)
}

find_pair <- function(df, pair_list, pair_desc) {
  nm <- names(df)
  nn <- norm_name(nm)
  for (p in pair_list) {
    a <- match(norm_name(p[1]), nn)
    b <- match(norm_name(p[2]), nn)
    if (!is.na(a) && !is.na(b)) {
      return(c(nm[a], nm[b]))
    }
  }
  stop(sprintf("Cannot identify %s column pair in file with columns: %s", pair_desc, paste(nm, collapse = ", ")), call. = FALSE)
}

find_first_match <- function(df, candidates, required = TRUE, desc = "") {
  nm <- names(df)
  nn <- norm_name(nm)
  cand_norm <- norm_name(candidates)
  idx <- match(cand_norm, nn)
  idx <- idx[!is.na(idx)]
  if (length(idx) == 0) {
    if (required) stop(sprintf("Cannot identify %s in columns: %s", desc, paste(nm, collapse = ", ")), call. = FALSE)
    return(NA_character_)
  }
  nm[idx[1]]
}

write_panel_audit <- function(df_list, filename, role) {
  audit_tbl <- bind_rows(df_list)
  write_tsv_out(audit_tbl, filename, role)
}

fig5B_stats <- {
  d <- fig5B_data %>% filter(!is.na(network_core_support_any))
  tab <- table(d$final_type_en, d$network_core_support_any)

  if (nrow(tab) < 2 || ncol(tab) < 2 || sum(tab) == 0) {
    tibble(
      method = "not_testable",
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p_value = NA_real_,
      df = NA_real_,
      note = "Insufficient non-missing data to perform Chi-square/Fisher"
    )
  } else {
    suppressWarnings(chisq_try <- tryCatch(chisq.test(tab, correct = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL))
    if (!is.null(chisq_try) && all(chisq_try$expected >= 5)) {
      tibble(
        method = "Chi-square",
        statistic = unname(chisq_try$statistic),
        p_value = chisq_try$p.value,
        df = unname(chisq_try$parameter),
        note = "Chi-square assumptions satisfied"
      )
    } else {
      fisher_try <- tryCatch(fisher.test(tab), error = function(e) e)
      if (inherits(fisher_try, "error")) {
        tibble(
          method = "fisher_failed",
          statistic = NA_real_,
          p_value = NA_real_,
          df = NA_real_,
          note = paste("Fisher test failed:", fisher_try$message)
        )
      } else {
        tibble(
          method = "Fisher",
          statistic = NA_real_,
          p_value = fisher_try$p.value,
          df = NA_real_,
          note = "Switched to Fisher due to expected count rule"
        )
      }
    }
  }
}

# 8) Generic helper for C / D-left / D-right

run_nonparam_panel <- function(df_in, value_col, panel_prefix, panel_title, y_label, add_hline_070 = FALSE) {
  stopifnot(all(c("sample_id", "final_type", "final_type_en", value_col) %in% names(df_in)))

  plot_data <- df_in %>%
    transmute(
      sample_id,
      final_type,
      final_type_en,
      value = .data[[value_col]]
    )

  d_nonmiss <- plot_data %>%
    filter(!is.na(value)) %>%
    mutate(
      final_type = factor(as.character(final_type), levels = final_type_levels_cn),
      final_type_en = factor(as.character(final_type_en), levels = final_type_levels_en)
    )

  if (nrow(d_nonmiss) == 0) {
    stop(sprintf("%s has zero non-missing values after preprocessing.", panel_prefix), call. = FALSE)
  }

  group_n <- tibble(
    final_type = factor(final_type_levels_cn, levels = final_type_levels_cn),
    final_type_en = factor(final_type_levels_en, levels = final_type_levels_en)
  ) %>%
    left_join(d_nonmiss %>% count(final_type, final_type_en, name = "n"),
              by = c("final_type", "final_type_en")) %>%
    mutate(n = replace_na(n, 0L))

  kw_tbl <- if (nrow(d_nonmiss) >= 3 && dplyr::n_distinct(d_nonmiss$final_type_en[!is.na(d_nonmiss$final_type_en)]) >= 2) {
    kw <- tryCatch(kruskal.test(value ~ final_type_en, data = d_nonmiss), error = function(e) e)
    if (inherits(kw, "error")) {
      tibble(method = "kruskal.test", statistic = NA_real_, df = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_, note = kw$message)
    } else {
      tibble(method = "kruskal.test", statistic = unname(kw$statistic), df = unname(kw$parameter), p_value = kw$p.value, note = "OK")
    }
  } else {
    tibble(method = "kruskal.test", statistic = NA_real_, df = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_, note = "Insufficient non-missing samples or groups")
  }

  dunn_tbl <- if (nrow(d_nonmiss) >= 3 && dplyr::n_distinct(d_nonmiss$final_type_en[!is.na(d_nonmiss$final_type_en)]) >= 2) {
    dunn <- tryCatch(FSA::dunnTest(value ~ final_type_en, data = d_nonmiss, method = "bh"), error = function(e) e)
    if (inherits(dunn, "error")) {
      tibble(comparison = NA_character_, z = NA_real_, p_unadjusted = NA_real_, p_adjusted_BH = NA_real_, note = dunn$message)
    } else {
      as_tibble(dunn$res) %>%
        transmute(
          comparison = Comparison,
          z = Z,
          p_unadjusted = P.unadj,
          p_adjusted_BH = P.adj,
          note = "OK"
        )
    }
  } else {
    tibble(comparison = NA_character_, z = NA_real_, p_unadjusted = NA_real_, p_adjusted_BH = NA_real_, note = "Insufficient non-missing samples or groups")
  }

  effect_tbl <- if (nrow(d_nonmiss) >= 3 && dplyr::n_distinct(d_nonmiss$final_type_en[!is.na(d_nonmiss$final_type_en)]) >= 2) {
    eff <- tryCatch(rstatix::kruskal_effsize(d_nonmiss, value ~ final_type_en), error = function(e) e)
    if (inherits(eff, "error")) {
      tibble(method = "epsilon_squared", effect_size = NA_real_, magnitude = NA_character_, note = eff$message)
    } else {
      eff %>%
        transmute(
          method = "epsilon_squared",
          effect_size = effsize,
          magnitude = magnitude,
          note = "OK"
        )
    }
  } else {
    tibble(method = "epsilon_squared", effect_size = NA_real_, magnitude = NA_character_, note = "Insufficient non-missing samples or groups")
  }

  p <- ggplot(d_nonmiss, aes(x = final_type_en, y = value, fill = final_type_en)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.65, alpha = 0.85, color = "#4D4D4D") +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.16, size = 1.5, alpha = 0.70, color = "#333333") +
    scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = final_type_colors_en, guide = "none", drop = FALSE) +
    labs(
      title = panel_title,
      x = "Sample state",
      y = y_label
    ) +
    theme_fig

  if (isTRUE(add_hline_070)) {
    p <- p +
      geom_hline(
        aes(yintercept = 0.70, linetype = "Threshold (0.70)"),
        color = "#444444",
        linewidth = 0.6,
        show.legend = TRUE
      ) +
      scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Threshold (0.70)" = "dashed"), name = NULL)
  }

  save_pdf_out(p, paste0(panel_prefix, ".pdf"), paste0(panel_prefix, "_plot"), width = 6.5, height = 5)

  audit_plot <- plot_data %>%
    transmute(
      section = "plot_data",
      sample_id,
      final_type = as.character(final_type),
      final_type_en = as.character(final_type_en),
      value,
      stat_name = value_col,
      stat_value = as.character(value),
      note = "Sample-level plotting data"
    )

  audit_group <- group_n %>%
    transmute(
      section = "group_n",
      sample_id = NA_character_,
      final_type = as.character(final_type),
      final_type_en = as.character(final_type_en),
      value = as.numeric(n),
      stat_name = "group_n",
      stat_value = as.character(n),
      note = "Group sizes"
    )

  audit_kw <- kw_tbl %>%
    transmute(
      section = "kw",
      sample_id = NA_character_,
      final_type = NA_character_,
      final_type_en = NA_character_,
      value = p_value,
      stat_name = method,
      stat_value = paste0("statistic=", statistic, "; df=", df, "; p=", p_value),
      note
    )

  audit_dunn <- dunn_tbl %>%
    transmute(
      section = "dunn",
      sample_id = NA_character_,
      final_type = NA_character_,
      final_type_en = comparison,
      value = p_adjusted_BH,
      stat_name = "Dunn_BH",
      stat_value = paste0("z=", z, "; p_unadj=", p_unadjusted, "; p_adj=", p_adjusted_BH),
      note
    )

  audit_eff <- effect_tbl %>%
    transmute(
      section = "effect_size",
      sample_id = NA_character_,
      final_type = NA_character_,
      final_type_en = magnitude,
      value = effect_size,
      stat_name = method,
      stat_value = as.character(effect_size),
      note
    )

  write_panel_audit(
    list(audit_plot, audit_group, audit_kw, audit_dunn, audit_eff),
    paste0(panel_prefix, "_audit.tsv"),
    paste0(panel_prefix, "_audit")
  )

  return(p)
}

  invisible(fp)

norm_name <- function(x) tolower(gsub("[^a-z0-9]", "", x))

coerce_bool <- function(x) {
  if (is.logical(x)) return(x)
  x_chr <- tolower(as.character(x))
  dplyr::case_when(
    x_chr %in% c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y", "supported", "support") ~ TRUE,
    x_chr %in% c("false", "f", "0", "no", "n", "absent") ~ FALSE,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )
}

ensure_numeric <- function(x) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(x)))

is_integerish_nonneg <- function(x) {
  y <- x[!is.na(x)]
  length(y) > 0 && all(y >= 0) && all(abs(y - round(y)) < 1e-8)
}

is_nonneg_numeric <- function(x) {
  y <- x[!is.na(x)]
  length(y) > 0 && all(y >= 0)
}

get_existing_candidates <- function(df, candidates) {
  nm <- names(df)
  nn <- norm_name(nm)
  out <- character(0)
  for (cand in candidates) {
    idx <- match(norm_name(cand), nn)
    if (!is.na(idx)) out <- c(out, nm[idx])
  }
  unique(out)
}

resolve_metric_col <- function(df, candidates, validator, metric_label, panel = "global") {
  existing <- get_existing_candidates(df, candidates)

  if (length(existing) == 0) {
    stop(sprintf("Cannot locate any candidate column for %s.", metric_label), call. = FALSE)
  }

  for (cand in existing) {
    vec <- ensure_numeric(df[[cand]])
    if (validator(vec)) {
      add_qc_log("column_resolution", panel, metric_label, "info",
                 sprintf("Resolved %s to column: %s", metric_label, cand),
                 sum(!is.na(vec)))
      return(cand)
    }
  }

  add_qc_log("column_resolution", panel, metric_label, "error",
             sprintf("Candidate columns found but none passed semantic validation: %s",
                     paste(existing, collapse = ", ")),
             NA_integer_)
  stop(sprintf("No semantically valid column found for %s.", metric_label), call. = FALSE)
}

resolve_bool_col <- function(df, candidates, metric_label, panel = "global") {
  existing <- get_existing_candidates(df, candidates)
  if (length(existing) == 0) {
    stop(sprintf("Cannot locate any candidate column for %s.", metric_label), call. = FALSE)
  }

  for (cand in existing) {
    vec <- coerce_bool(df[[cand]])
    y <- vec[!is.na(vec)]
    if (length(y) > 0) {
      add_qc_log("column_resolution", panel, metric_label, "info",
                 sprintf("Resolved %s to column: %s", metric_label, cand),
                 length(y))
      return(cand)
    }
  }

  add_qc_log("column_resolution", panel, metric_label, "error",
             sprintf("Candidate columns found but none had usable boolean values: %s",
                     paste(existing, collapse = ", ")),
             NA_integer_)
  stop(sprintf("No usable boolean column found for %s.", metric_label), call. = FALSE)
}

find_pair <- function(df, pair_list, pair_desc) {
  nm <- names(df)
  nn <- norm_name(nm)
  for (p in pair_list) {
    a <- match(norm_name(p[1]), nn)
    b <- match(norm_name(p[2]), nn)
    if (!is.na(a) && !is.na(b)) {
      return(c(nm[a], nm[b]))
    }
  }
  stop(sprintf("Cannot identify %s column pair in file with columns: %s", pair_desc, paste(nm, collapse = ", ")), call. = FALSE)
}

find_first_match <- function(df, candidates, required = TRUE, desc = "") {
  nm <- names(df)
  nn <- norm_name(nm)
  cand_norm <- norm_name(candidates)
  idx <- match(cand_norm, nn)
  idx <- idx[!is.na(idx)]
  if (length(idx) == 0) {
    if (required) stop(sprintf("Cannot identify %s in columns: %s", desc, paste(nm, collapse = ", ")), call. = FALSE)
    return(NA_character_)
  }
  nm[idx[1]]
}

write_panel_audit <- function(df_list, filename, role) {
  audit_tbl <- bind_rows(df_list)
  write_tsv_out(audit_tbl, filename, role)
}

# ------------------------------
# 4) Read input
# ------------------------------
df_sample <- read_tsv_safe(input_files$sample_type_call)
df_addon  <- read_tsv_safe(input_files$sample_type_call_network_addon)
df_rep    <- read_tsv_safe(input_files$reproducible_edges)
df_mspec  <- read_tsv_safe(input_files$marker_specific_edges)

append_manifest("input_sample_type_call", input_files$sample_type_call, df_sample, "Input file")
append_manifest("input_network_addon", input_files$sample_type_call_network_addon, df_addon, "Input file")
append_manifest("input_reproducible_edges", input_files$reproducible_edges, df_rep, "Input file")
append_manifest("input_marker_specific_edges", input_files$marker_specific_edges, df_mspec, "Input file")

require_cols(df_sample, c("sample_id", "final_type"), "sample_type_call.tsv")
require_cols(df_addon, c("sample_id"), "sample_type_call_network_addon.tsv")

check_unique_sample_id(df_sample, "sample_type_call.tsv")
check_unique_sample_id(df_addon, "sample_type_call_network_addon.tsv")

df_sample <- df_sample %>%
  mutate(
    sample_id = as.character(sample_id),
    final_type = as.character(final_type)
  )

if (!all(df_sample$final_type %in% final_type_levels_cn)) {
  bad <- sort(unique(df_sample$final_type[!df_sample$final_type %in% final_type_levels_cn]))
  stop(sprintf("Unexpected final_type values in sample_type_call.tsv: %s", paste(bad, collapse = ", ")), call. = FALSE)
}

df_sample <- df_sample %>%
  mutate(
    final_type = factor(final_type, levels = final_type_levels_cn),
    final_type_en = recode(as.character(final_type), !!!final_type_map),
    final_type_en = factor(final_type_en, levels = final_type_levels_en)
  )

df_addon <- df_addon %>%
  mutate(sample_id = as.character(sample_id))

# ------------------------------
# 5) Resolve addon metric columns
# ------------------------------
core_any_col <- resolve_bool_col(
  df_addon,
  candidates = c(
    "network_core_support_any",
    "core_support_any",
    "network_support_any",
    "core_any",
    "core_supported_any"
  ),

)

core_n_col <- resolve_metric_col(
  df_addon,
  candidates = c(

    "network_core_support_count",
    "core_support_n",
    "core_support_count",
    "network_core_n",

  ),

)

burden_col <- resolve_metric_col(

plot_base <- df_sample %>%

if (sum(!is.na(plot_base$network_core_support_n)) == 0) {

}

core_any_nonmiss <- plot_base %>% filter(!is.na(network_core_support_any))
if (nrow(core_any_nonmiss) > 0 && dplyr::n_distinct(core_any_nonmiss$network_core_support_any) == 1) {
  add_qc_log(
    "data_warning", "Fig5B", "network_core_support_any", "warning",
    "Binary core support is constant across all non-missing samples; Fig5B will be weak or untestable.",
    nrow(core_any_nonmiss)
  )
}

# ------------------------------
# 6) Figure 5A - network schematic
# ------------------------------
edge_pairs <- list(
  c("source", "target"),
  c("from", "to"),
  c("node1", "node2"),
  c("taxon_a", "taxon_b")
)

rep_pair <- find_pair(df_rep, edge_pairs, "reproducible_edges endpoints")
ms_pair  <- find_pair(df_mspec, edge_pairs, "marker_specific_edges endpoints")

rep_stability_col <- find_first_match(
  df_rep,
  c("edge_stability_score", "stability_score", "edge_stability", "stability"),
  required = FALSE,
  desc = "edge stability score in reproducible_edges"
)
rep_strict_col <- find_first_match(
  df_rep,
  c("reproducible_edge_strict", "edge_strict", "strict", "is_strict"),
  required = FALSE,
  desc = "strict reproducible edge flag"
)
rep_loose_col <- find_first_match(
  df_rep,
  c("reproducible_edge_loose", "edge_loose", "loose", "is_loose"),
  required = FALSE,
  desc = "loose reproducible edge flag"
)
rep_module_col <- find_first_match(
  df_rep,
  c("core_module", "module", "component", "cluster"),
  required = FALSE,
  desc = "module/core module in reproducible_edges"
)

ms_marker_col <- find_first_match(
  df_mspec,
  c("marker_specific_edge_flag", "marker_specific", "is_marker_specific", "marker_flag"),
  required = FALSE,
  desc = "marker-specific edge flag"
)
ms_module_col <- find_first_match(
  df_mspec,
  c("core_module", "module", "component", "cluster"),
  required = FALSE,
  desc = "module/core module in marker_specific_edges"
)

rep_edges_std <- df_rep %>%
  transmute(
    node_from = as.character(.data[[rep_pair[1]]]),
    node_to   = as.character(.data[[rep_pair[2]]]),
    edge_type = "reproducible/core-like",
    edge_stability_score = if (!is.na(rep_stability_col)) ensure_numeric(.data[[rep_stability_col]]) else NA_real_,
    reproducible_edge_strict = if (!is.na(rep_strict_col)) coerce_bool(.data[[rep_strict_col]]) else NA,
    reproducible_edge_loose  = if (!is.na(rep_loose_col)) coerce_bool(.data[[rep_loose_col]]) else NA,
    marker_specific_edge_flag = FALSE,
    module = if (!is.na(rep_module_col)) as.character(.data[[rep_module_col]]) else NA_character_,
    source_table = "reproducible_edges.tsv"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(node_from), !is.na(node_to), node_from != "", node_to != "")

ms_edges_std <- df_mspec %>%
  transmute(
    node_from = as.character(.data[[ms_pair[1]]]),

    module = if (!is.na(ms_module_col)) as.character(.data[[ms_module_col]]) else NA_character_,
    source_table = "marker_specific_edges.tsv"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(node_from), !is.na(node_to), node_from != "", node_to != "")

rep_priority <- rep_edges_std %>%
  mutate(
    strict_priority = case_when(
      !is.na(reproducible_edge_strict) & reproducible_edge_strict ~ 2L,
      is.na(reproducible_edge_strict) & !is.na(edge_stability_score) & edge_stability_score >= 0.70 ~ 1L,
      !is.na(edge_stability_score) ~ 0L,
      TRUE ~ -1L
    ),
    stability_rank = if_else(is.na(edge_stability_score), -Inf, edge_stability_score)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(strict_priority), desc(stability_rank))

if (nrow(rep_priority) == 0) {
  stop("reproducible_edges.tsv has no usable edges for Figure 5A.", call. = FALSE)
}

cap_n <- min(80L, nrow(rep_priority))
rep_top <- rep_priority %>% slice_head(n = cap_n)

igraph_rep <- igraph::graph_from_data_frame(rep_top %>% select(node_from, node_to), directed = FALSE)
comp <- igraph::components(igraph_rep)
comp_tbl <- tibble(node = names(comp$membership), component = as.integer(comp$membership))

largest_comp <- comp_tbl %>%
  count(component, name = "n_nodes") %>%
  arrange(desc(n_nodes), component) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  pull(component)

selected_nodes_core <- comp_tbl %>%
  filter(component == largest_comp) %>%
  pull(node)

selected_rep_edges <- rep_top %>%
  filter(node_from %in% selected_nodes_core, node_to %in% selected_nodes_core)

if (length(selected_nodes_core) > 25) {
  selected_rep_edges <- selected_rep_edges %>%
    arrange(desc(strict_priority), desc(stability_rank)) %>%
    slice_head(n = min(40L, n()))
  selected_nodes_core <- unique(c(selected_rep_edges$node_from, selected_rep_edges$node_to))
}

selected_marker_edges <- ms_edges_std %>%
  filter(node_from %in% selected_nodes_core | node_to %in% selected_nodes_core)

if (nrow(selected_marker_edges) > 60) {
  selected_marker_edges <- selected_marker_edges %>% slice_head(n = 60)
}

selected_edges <- bind_rows(
  selected_rep_edges %>% mutate(selected_reason = "Prioritized reproducible/core-like edges"),
  selected_marker_edges %>% mutate(selected_reason = "Marker-specific edges touching selected core nodes")
) %>%
  mutate(
    module = na_if(module, ""),
    edge_type = factor(edge_type, levels = c("reproducible/core-like", "marker-specific"))
  ) %>%
  distinct(node_from, node_to, edge_type, .keep_all = TRUE)

if (nrow(selected_edges) == 0) {
  stop("Figure 5A selection produced zero edges.", call. = FALSE)
}

selected_nodes <- tibble(node = unique(c(selected_edges$node_from, selected_edges$node_to))) %>%
  mutate(
    is_core_selected = node %in% selected_nodes_core,
    module = purrr::map_chr(node, function(nd) {
      m1 <- selected_edges %>%
        filter(node_from == nd | node_to == nd) %>%
        pull(module)
      m1 <- m1[!is.na(m1) & m1 != ""]
      if (length(m1) == 0) NA_character_ else names(sort(table(m1), decreasing = TRUE))[1]
    }),
    node_class = if_else(is_core_selected, "Core-selected node", "Context node")
  )

selection_log <- tibble(

    ifelse(is.na(ms_module_col), "<none>", ms_module_col),
    "Prioritize strict reproducible edges; fallback to high-stability reproducible edges",

    paste0(
      "selected_edges=", nrow(selected_edges),
      "; selected_nodes=", nrow(selected_nodes),
      "; selected_core_nodes=", sum(selected_nodes$is_core_selected)
    )
  )
)

gA_graph <- igraph::graph_from_data_frame(

set.seed(123)

fig5B_data <- plot_base %>%

fig5B_summary <- fig5B_data %>%

      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(support_label)) %>%
  count(final_type, final_type_en, support_label, name = "n") %>%
  tidyr::complete(
    final_type = factor(final_type_levels_cn, levels = final_type_levels_cn),
    final_type_en = factor(final_type_levels_en, levels = final_type_levels_en),
    support_label = c("supported", "absent"),
    fill = list(n = 0)
  ) %>%
  group_by(final_type, final_type_en) %>%
  mutate(group_n = sum(n), proportion = if_else(group_n > 0, n / group_n, NA_real_)) %>%
  ungroup()

fig5B_stats <- {
  d <- fig5B_data %>% filter(!is.na(network_core_support_any))
  tab <- table(d$final_type_en, d$network_core_support_any)

  if (nrow(tab) < 2 || ncol(tab) < 2 || sum(tab) == 0) {
    tibble(
      method = "not_testable",
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p_value = NA_real_,
      df = NA_real_,
      note = "Insufficient non-missing data to perform Chi-square/Fisher"
    )
  } else {
    suppressWarnings(chisq_try <- tryCatch(chisq.test(tab, correct = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL))
    if (!is.null(chisq_try) && all(chisq_try$expected >= 5)) {
      tibble(
        method = "Chi-square",
        statistic = unname(chisq_try$statistic),
        p_value = chisq_try$p.value,
        df = unname(chisq_try$parameter),
        note = "Chi-square assumptions satisfied"
      )
    } else {
      fisher_try <- tryCatch(fisher.test(tab), error = function(e) e)
      if (inherits(fisher_try, "error")) {
        tibble(
          method = "fisher_failed",
          statistic = NA_real_,
          p_value = NA_real_,
          df = NA_real_,
          note = paste("Fisher test failed:", fisher_try$message)
        )
      } else {
        tibble(
          method = "Fisher",
          statistic = NA_real_,
          p_value = fisher_try$p.value,
          df = NA_real_,
          note = "Switched to Fisher due to expected count rule"
        )
      }
    }
  }
}

# ------------------------------
# 8) Generic helper for 5C / 5D
# ------------------------------
run_nonparam_panel <- function(df_in, value_col, panel_prefix, panel_title, y_label) {
  stopifnot(all(c("sample_id", "final_type", "final_type_en", value_col) %in% names(df_in)))

  plot_data <- df_in %>%
    transmute(
      sample_id,
      final_type,
      final_type_en,
      value = .data[[value_col]]
    )

  d_nonmiss <- plot_data %>%
    filter(!is.na(value)) %>%
    mutate(
      final_type = factor(as.character(final_type), levels = final_type_levels_cn),
      final_type_en = factor(as.character(final_type_en), levels = final_type_levels_en)
    )

  if (nrow(d_nonmiss) == 0) {
    stop(sprintf("%s has zero non-missing values after preprocessing.", panel_prefix), call. = FALSE)
  }

  group_n <- tibble(
    final_type = factor(final_type_levels_cn, levels = final_type_levels_cn),
    final_type_en = factor(final_type_levels_en, levels = final_type_levels_en)
  ) %>%
    left_join(d_nonmiss %>% count(final_type, final_type_en, name = "n"),
              by = c("final_type", "final_type_en")) %>%
    mutate(n = replace_na(n, 0L))

  kw_tbl <- if (nrow(d_nonmiss) >= 3 && dplyr::n_distinct(d_nonmiss$final_type_en[!is.na(d_nonmiss$final_type_en)]) >= 2) {
    kw <- tryCatch(kruskal.test(value ~ final_type_en, data = d_nonmiss), error = function(e) e)
    if (inherits(kw, "error")) {
      tibble(method = "kruskal.test", statistic = NA_real_, df = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_, note = kw$message)
    } else {
      tibble(method = "kruskal.test", statistic = unname(kw$statistic), df = unname(kw$parameter), p_value = kw$p.value, note = "OK")
    }
  } else {
    tibble(method = "kruskal.test", statistic = NA_real_, df = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_, note = "Insufficient non-missing samples or groups")
  }

  dunn_tbl <- if (nrow(d_nonmiss) >= 3 && dplyr::n_distinct(d_nonmiss$final_type_en[!is.na(d_nonmiss$final_type_en)]) >= 2) {
    dunn <- tryCatch(FSA::dunnTest(value ~ final_type_en, data = d_nonmiss, method = "bh"), error = function(e) e)
    if (inherits(dunn, "error")) {
      tibble(comparison = NA_character_, z = NA_real_, p_unadjusted = NA_real_, p_adjusted_BH = NA_real_, note = dunn$message)
    } else {
      as_tibble(dunn$res) %>%
        transmute(
          comparison = Comparison,
          z = Z,
          p_unadjusted = P.unadj,
          p_adjusted_BH = P.adj,
          note = "OK"
        )
    }
  } else {
    tibble(comparison = NA_character_, z = NA_real_, p_unadjusted = NA_real_, p_adjusted_BH = NA_real_, note = "Insufficient non-missing samples or groups")
  }

  effect_tbl <- if (nrow(d_nonmiss) >= 3 && dplyr::n_distinct(d_nonmiss$final_type_en[!is.na(d_nonmiss$final_type_en)]) >= 2) {
    eff <- tryCatch(rstatix::kruskal_effsize(d_nonmiss, value ~ final_type_en), error = function(e) e)
    if (inherits(eff, "error")) {
      tibble(method = "epsilon_squared", effect_size = NA_real_, magnitude = NA_character_, note = eff$message)
    } else {
      eff %>%
        transmute(
          method = "epsilon_squared",
          effect_size = effsize,
          magnitude = magnitude,
          note = "OK"
        )
    }
  } else {
    tibble(method = "epsilon_squared", effect_size = NA_real_, magnitude = NA_character_, note = "Insufficient non-missing samples or groups")
  }

norm_name <- function(x) tolower(gsub("[^a-z0-9]", "", x))

coerce_bool <- function(x) {
  if (is.logical(x)) return(x)
  x_chr <- tolower(as.character(x))
  dplyr::case_when(
    x_chr %in% c("true", "t", "1", "yes", "y", "supported", "support") ~ TRUE,
    x_chr %in% c("false", "f", "0", "no", "n", "absent") ~ FALSE,
    TRUE ~ NA
  )
}

ensure_numeric <- function(x) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(x)))

is_integerish_nonneg <- function(x) {
  y <- x[!is.na(x)]
  length(y) > 0 && all(y >= 0) && all(abs(y - round(y)) < 1e-8)
}

is_nonneg_numeric <- function(x) {
  y <- x[!is.na(x)]
  length(y) > 0 && all(y >= 0)
}

get_existing_candidates <- function(df, candidates) {
  nm <- names(df)
  nn <- norm_name(nm)
  out <- character(0)
  for (cand in candidates) {
    idx <- match(norm_name(cand), nn)
    if (!is.na(idx)) out <- c(out, nm[idx])
  }
  unique(out)
}

resolve_metric_col <- function(df, candidates, validator, metric_label, panel = "global") {
  existing <- get_existing_candidates(df, candidates)

  if (length(existing) == 0) {
    stop(sprintf("Cannot locate any candidate column for %s.", metric_label), call. = FALSE)
  }

  for (cand in existing) {
    vec <- ensure_numeric(df[[cand]])
    if (validator(vec)) {
      add_qc_log(
        "column_resolution", panel, metric_label, "info",
        sprintf("Resolved %s to column: %s", metric_label, cand),
        sum(!is.na(vec))
      )
      return(cand)
    }
  }

  add_qc_log(
    "column_resolution", panel, metric_label, "error",
    sprintf("Candidate columns found but none passed semantic validation: %s",
            paste(existing, collapse = ", ")),
    NA_integer_
  )
  stop(sprintf("No semantically valid column found for %s.", metric_label), call. = FALSE)
}

resolve_bool_col <- function(df, candidates, metric_label, panel = "global") {
  existing <- get_existing_candidates(df, candidates)

  if (length(existing) == 0) {
    stop(sprintf("Cannot locate any candidate column for %s.", metric_label), call. = FALSE)
  }

  for (cand in existing) {
    vec <- coerce_bool(df[[cand]])
    y <- vec[!is.na(vec)]
    if (length(y) > 0) {
      add_qc_log(
        "column_resolution", panel, metric_label, "info",
        sprintf("Resolved %s to column: %s", metric_label, cand),
        length(y)
      )
      return(cand)
    }
  }

  add_qc_log(
    "column_resolution", panel, metric_label, "error",
    sprintf("Candidate columns found but none had usable boolean values: %s",
            paste(existing, collapse = ", ")),
    NA_integer_
  )
  stop(sprintf("No usable boolean column found for %s.", metric_label), call. = FALSE)
}

find_pair <- function(df, pair_list, pair_desc) {
  nm <- names(df)
  nn <- norm_name(nm)
  for (p in pair_list) {
    a <- match(norm_name(p[1]), nn)
    b <- match(norm_name(p[2]), nn)
    if (!is.na(a) && !is.na(b)) {
      return(c(nm[a], nm[b]))
    }
  }
  stop(sprintf("Cannot identify %s column pair in file with columns: %s", pair_desc, paste(nm, collapse = ", ")), call. = FALSE)
}

find_first_match <- function(df, candidates, required = TRUE, desc = "") {
  nm <- names(df)
  nn <- norm_name(nm)
  cand_norm <- norm_name(candidates)
  idx <- match(cand_norm, nn)
  idx <- idx[!is.na(idx)]
  if (length(idx) == 0) {
    if (required) stop(sprintf("Cannot identify %s in columns: %s", desc, paste(nm, collapse = ", ")), call. = FALSE)
    return(NA_character_)
  }
  nm[idx[1]]
}

    "network_marker_specific_burden",
    "marker_specific_burden",
    "network_marker_burden",
    "marker_burden"
  ),
  validator = is_nonneg_numeric,
  metric_label = "network_marker_specific_burden"
)

plot_base <- df_sample %>%

  mutate(
    network_core_support_any = coerce_bool(.data[[core_any_col]]),

  )

if (sum(!is.na(plot_base$network_core_support_n)) == 0) {
  stop("network_core_support_n resolved successfully but has no non-missing values after join.", call. = FALSE)
}

core_any_nonmiss <- plot_base %>% filter(!is.na(network_core_support_any))
if (nrow(core_any_nonmiss) > 0 && dplyr::n_distinct(core_any_nonmiss$network_core_support_any) == 1) {

    "data_warning", "Fig5B", "network_core_support_any", "warning",

# ------------------------------
# 7) Figure 5A - network schematic
# ------------------------------
edge_pairs <- list(
  c("source", "target"),
  c("from", "to"),
  c("node1", "node2"),
  c("taxon_a", "taxon_b")
)

rep_pair <- find_pair(df_rep, edge_pairs, "reproducible_edges endpoints")
ms_pair  <- find_pair(df_mspec, edge_pairs, "marker_specific_edges endpoints")

rep_stability_col <- find_first_match(
  df_rep,
  c("edge_stability_score", "stability_score", "edge_stability", "stability"),
  required = FALSE,
  desc = "edge stability score in reproducible_edges"
)
rep_strict_col <- find_first_match(
  df_rep,
  c("reproducible_edge_strict", "edge_strict", "strict", "is_strict"),
  required = FALSE,
  desc = "strict reproducible edge flag"
)
rep_loose_col <- find_first_match(
  df_rep,
  c("reproducible_edge_loose", "edge_loose", "loose", "is_loose"),
  required = FALSE,
  desc = "loose reproducible edge flag"
)
rep_module_col <- find_first_match(
  df_rep,
  c("core_module", "module", "component", "cluster"),
  required = FALSE,
  desc = "module/core module in reproducible_edges"
)

ms_marker_col <- find_first_match(
  df_mspec,
  c("marker_specific_edge_flag", "marker_specific", "is_marker_specific", "marker_flag"),
  required = FALSE,
  desc = "marker-specific edge flag"
)
ms_module_col <- find_first_match(
  df_mspec,
  c("core_module", "module", "component", "cluster"),
  required = FALSE,
  desc = "module/core module in marker_specific_edges"
)

rep_edges_std <- df_rep %>%
  transmute(
    node_from = as.character(.data[[rep_pair[1]]]),
    node_to   = as.character(.data[[rep_pair[2]]]),
    edge_type = "reproducible/core-like",
    edge_stability_score = if (!is.na(rep_stability_col)) ensure_numeric(.data[[rep_stability_col]]) else NA_real_,
    reproducible_edge_strict = if (!is.na(rep_strict_col)) coerce_bool(.data[[rep_strict_col]]) else NA,
    reproducible_edge_loose  = if (!is.na(rep_loose_col)) coerce_bool(.data[[rep_loose_col]]) else NA,
    marker_specific_edge_flag = FALSE,
    module = if (!is.na(rep_module_col)) as.character(.data[[rep_module_col]]) else NA_character_,
    source_table = "reproducible_edges.tsv"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(node_from), !is.na(node_to), node_from != "", node_to != "")

ms_edges_std <- df_mspec %>%
  transmute(
    node_from = as.character(.data[[ms_pair[1]]]),
    node_to   = as.character(.data[[ms_pair[2]]]),
    edge_type = "marker-specific",
    edge_stability_score = NA_real_,
    reproducible_edge_strict = NA,

    marker_specific_edge_flag = if (!is.na(ms_marker_col)) coerce_bool(.data[[ms_marker_col]]) else TRUE,
    module = if (!is.na(ms_module_col)) as.character(.data[[ms_module_col]]) else NA_character_,
    source_table = "marker_specific_edges.tsv"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(node_from), !is.na(node_to), node_from != "", node_to != "")

rep_priority <- rep_edges_std %>%
  mutate(
    strict_priority = case_when(
      !is.na(reproducible_edge_strict) & reproducible_edge_strict ~ 2L,
      is.na(reproducible_edge_strict) & !is.na(edge_stability_score) & edge_stability_score >= 0.70 ~ 1L,
      !is.na(edge_stability_score) ~ 0L,
      TRUE ~ -1L
    ),
    stability_rank = if_else(is.na(edge_stability_score), -Inf, edge_stability_score)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(strict_priority), desc(stability_rank))

if (nrow(rep_priority) == 0) {
  stop("reproducible_edges.tsv has no usable edges for Figure 5A.", call. = FALSE)
}

cap_n <- min(80L, nrow(rep_priority))
rep_top <- rep_priority %>% slice_head(n = cap_n)

igraph_rep <- igraph::graph_from_data_frame(rep_top %>% select(node_from, node_to), directed = FALSE)
comp <- igraph::components(igraph_rep)
comp_tbl <- tibble(node = names(comp$membership), component = as.integer(comp$membership))

largest_comp <- comp_tbl %>%
  count(component, name = "n_nodes") %>%
  arrange(desc(n_nodes), component) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  pull(component)

selected_nodes_core <- comp_tbl %>%
  filter(component == largest_comp) %>%
  pull(node)

selected_rep_edges <- rep_top %>%
  filter(node_from %in% selected_nodes_core, node_to %in% selected_nodes_core)

if (length(selected_nodes_core) > 25) {
  selected_rep_edges <- selected_rep_edges %>%
    arrange(desc(strict_priority), desc(stability_rank)) %>%

  selected_nodes_core <- unique(c(selected_rep_edges$node_from, selected_rep_edges$node_to))
}

selected_marker_edges <- ms_edges_std %>%

if (nrow(selected_marker_edges) > 60) {

}

selected_edges <- bind_rows(

) %>%
  mutate(
    module = na_if(module, ""),
    edge_type = factor(edge_type, levels = c("reproducible/core-like", "marker-specific"))
  ) %>%

if (nrow(selected_edges) == 0) {

}

selected_nodes <- tibble(node = unique(c(selected_edges$node_from, selected_edges$node_to))) %>%

      m1 <- m1[!is.na(m1) & m1 != ""]

    "Prioritize strict reproducible edges; fallback to high-stability reproducible edges",

      "selected_edges=", nrow(selected_edges),
      "; selected_nodes=", nrow(selected_nodes),

    )
  )
)

    )
